title: University Press Publication Data Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating how a university press might utilize data structures to manage the publication lifecycle, from manuscript submission to final book distribution.
relationships: A submitted manuscript is enqueued for processing. Reviewer assignments are managed as a linked list. Author info is quickly accessed via a hash table. Inventory is efficiently searched and sorted using a tree. Sales data connections between books, authors, and vendors form a graph for analysis.
